info.name: Play Spotter API
info.description: Play Spotter API - set `baseUrl`, `token` (Firebase ID token from Login), and optional `submissionId`, `campaignId`, `playgroundId`, `cityId`, `regionKey`. Includes reports, public ad serving, advertiser submission/payment/campaign flows, admin ad review, region seed/viewport preview, analytics + event tracking, discounts, and server log tail. Large admin playground tools remain under Admin; seed photo routes under /api/seed/* are not fully duplicated here.

item.name: Recategorize Types (apply, seeded)
item.description: Writes inferred playgroundType. Run the dry-run request first. Same parameters supported via query string (dryRun, scope, regionKey, limit).

item.name: Recategorize Types (dry run, seeded)
item.description: Re-infer playgroundType from Google types + name. Scopes: seeded | missing | stale_on_seed | recheck_seed | all. Optional regionKey in body. Max limit 5000 per request.

item.name: GET last viewport seed preview (candidate list)
POST expand region (+10 mi coverage crawl)
POST full reseed region (destructive; clears playgrounds for region)
POST lightweight re-seed (center grid, upserts only)
Merge Preview (dedup + campus + address sub-venues, dry run)

request.description: Admin Firebase user (custom claim admin=true). Uses /api/admin/... so it works when your reverse proxy only forwards /api/* to Node; /admin/server-logs also exists for direct access. Set SERVER_LOG_OUT on the server. Response is text/plain.

exec: var r = pm.response.json(); if (r.token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('token', r.token); }
